mapper.insert: insert into attendance (emp_id, work_date, check_in_time) values (#{empId}, current_date, #{checkInTime})
mapper.select: SELECT a.emp_id, a.work_date AS startDate, a.lateness_minutes, a.reason, f.file_name AS fimeName, f.file_path, f.file_size, f.file_type, s.status AS managerCheck FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN file f ON a.attendance_id = f.attendance_id LEFT JOIN signatures s ON a.attendance_id = s.attendance_id WHERE a.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND a.lateness_minutes > 0 ORDER BY a.work_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalLateCount, SUM(lateness_minutes) AS totalLateMinutes FROM attendance WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND lateness_minutes > 0

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.work_date) AS totalDate, -- 휴가 제외 실제 근무일 수 (COUNT(DISTINCT a.work_date) - IFNULL(SUM(lv.leave_days), 0)) AS actualWorkDays,
SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time)) AS totalTime,
SUM(CASE WHEN a.night_work_hour IS NOT NULL THEN a.night_work_hour ELSE 0 END) AS nightWorkHour, SUM(CASE WHEN a.holiday_work_hour IS NOT NULL THEN a.holiday_work_hour ELSE 0 END) AS hoildayWorkHour,
SUM(CASE WHEN a.lateness_minutes IS NOT NULL THEN a.lateness_minutes ELSE 0 END) AS latenessMinutes,
bt.business_trip_id AS businessTripId, bt.start_date AS businessTripStart, bt.end_date AS businessTripEnd,
ab.absence_id AS absenceId, lv.leave_days AS leaveDays
FROM employee e LEFT JOIN attendance a ON e.emp_id = a.emp_id LEFT JOIN business bt ON a.attendance_id = bt.attendance_id LEFT JOIN absence ab ON a.attendance_id = ab.attendance_id LEFT JOIN leave lv ON a.attendance_id = lv.attendance_id
WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND ( (#{category} = '일반근무' AND a.night_work_hour IS NULL AND a.holiday_work_hour IS NULL) OR (#{category} = '야근' AND a.night_work_hour IS NOT NULL) OR (#{category} = '휴일근무' AND a.holiday_work_hour IS NOT NULL) OR (#{category} = '출장' AND bt.business_trip_id IS NOT NULL) )
GROUP BY e.emp_id
